issue_statement: Engineering open/import still lack one canonical ordered result envelope.
expected_outcome: SCE returns one canonical result envelope from the existing engineering open/import paths.
impact_scope: engineering open/import feedback, action result rendering, project panel actions
reproduction_steps: Run the current engineering open or import path
Observe that one canonical ordered result envelope is not yet guaranteed
Observe that adapters still need to infer action meaning from partial output
forbidden_workarounds: Do not redefine preview readiness in this spec
Do not hide non-applicable step state by dropping steps silently
